/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/fishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/fishbot_interfaces/srv/fish_bot_config__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jerry/AutoSweeperSystem/AutoSweeperSystem_ws/build/fishbot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
